query: I built a workflow called 'Lead Intake' on my prod n8n and I want the same workflow copied onto my staging instance so I can test changes there. Both are connected through n8n-mcp. Can you replicate it?
expected_behavior: Activate n8n-multi-instance and treat this as the copy-between-instances task
Switch to prod (own turn), confirm current, then read the source with n8n_get_workflow
Switch to staging as its OWN separate call — never batched with the create-on-staging step (parallel-batch order isn't guaranteed, so a batched create could run against prod)
Re-verify current == staging with n8n_instances({mode:"list"}) before creating, because the create is what makes the copy permanent
Create the workflow on staging with n8n_create_workflow only after the target is confirmed
Sequence each instance's steps in its own turn rather than overlapping switch and operation
Note that credentials referenced by the workflow are per-instance and won't copy automatically — they must exist on staging too
notes: Two-instance choreography: read on A, switch to B in its own turn, verify current == B, write on B. The ordering rule (switch not batched with the dependent op) is the trap that quietly writes to the wrong instance.
